videos.description: The Knicks erase a 17-point fourth-quarter deficit to take down the Cavaliers to open up the Christmas Day slate.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Knicks come from behind to beat Cavaliers) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: Knicks come from behind to beat Cavaliers

videos.description: Donovan Mitchell tosses it up for Jarrett Allen for a big Cavaliers slam dunk.

videos.headline: Donovan Mitchell finds Jarrett Allen for the dunk

videos.description: Jalen Brunson makes a crossover move to get the bucket for the Knicks.

videos.headline: Jalen Brunson scores off a nice crossover

videos.description: Jordan Clarkson gets a steal and knocks down a 3-pointer on the other end for the Knicks.

videos.headline: Jordan Clarkson makes a great defensive play, then hits a 3

videos.description: Mikal Bridges blocks Darius Garland's shot and makes the layup on the other end.

videos.description: Evan Mobley gets up for the beautiful slam dunk

videos.headline: Evan Mobley skies for a big dunk

videos.description: Jalen Brunson rises over Donovan Mitchell, knocks down the 3-pointer and gets the foul.

videos.headline: Jalen Brunson nails the and-1 trey over Donovan Mitchell

videos.description: Dean Wade makes the tricky layup and gets the foul against the Knicks.

videos.headline: Dean Wade gets the and-1 for the Cavaliers

videos.description: Jaylon Tyson rises up for a major jam to increase the Cavaliers' lead against the Knicks.

videos.description: Tyler Kolek sinks a clutch three in the fourth quarter to cut the Cavaliers' lead.

videos.headline: Tyler Kolek knocks down a big three for Knicks

videos.description: Jalen Brunson knocks down a 3-pointer over Donovan Mitchell for a Knicks lead late in the fourth quarter.
